name: coretex-evaluator-v2-dgen1-deep
_reclaimedRegionsNote: RetrievalKeys (lens) + Codebook (EvidencePolicy) RECLAIMED in r4 — NOT valid miner surfaces (both oracle-FAILED; admission-headroom ~0); lens/evidencePolicy knobs are INERT. Redefined in substrate-r5 as a typed PolicyAtom region (SUBSTRATE_R5_POLICY_ATOMS.md).

firstStageTopKSelection.reason: DEFAULT_PROFILE placeholder; calibration Run 1 replaces this with the production-pinned method and evidence.

_evalSemanticsNote: temporalStaleContrast=true + w_temporal 0.08->0.13 / w_retrieval 0.75->0.70: temporal-specific answer-vs-contrast (stale = contrast, 0 nDCG reward, recall tracked separately). Real-Qwen CONFIRMED yield 0.30->0.5625. Eval-semantics only; re-pin baseline before launch.
_candidateNote: DGEN-1 DEEP candidate, derived from evaluator-profile-v2-ownerscope-r1.json (2026-05-23). Adds the locked deep relation-surfacing fix as PROFILE knobs (categoryLensSeedTopK=2, categoryLensHopBudget=1, categoryLensEvidenceBundle=true) so harnesses that consume scoringOptionsFromProfile WITHOUT CLI overrides (e.g. simulate-v2-long-horizon.mjs) apply the hop=1 evidence-bundle fix instead of flooding at deep-universe scale. All other knobs identical to ownerscope-r1. These categoryLens* knobs are SCORER/OPERATOR-mediated (not miner-facing); relation is a bounded scorer-mediated secondary per the Strategy Diversity downgrade. NOT launch-signed; baseline unpinned (runtime per-epoch). majorDeltaThreshold=10 candidate (P1/P2-validated, ABSOLUTE new-eval_hidden count); LAUNCH must recalibrate to ~5% of the launch corpus eval_hidden population.
_controllerNote: Launch controller calibration (2026-05-24 same-seed A/B, V2_DGEN1_ENDURANCE_FINDINGS.md §Controller-calibration A/B): qualityHighThresholdMult=1 lets the decay branch engage; rampUpMaxRatio 1.1 gentler than 1.5. Recovered temporal runway 51->64 (+25%), anti-cheat 0/180. Sourced via controllerParamsFromProfile().
